events.title: YSC Annual Meeting - Social Hour
events.description: YSC annual meeting social hour that kicked off the afternoon at 1:00 PM on February 1, 2026 at the Swedish American Hall. About 40 people attended; this preceded the official business of the annual meeting.

events.title: YSC Happy Hour - Transamerica Building (Polina & Mary)
events.description: YSC Happy Hour on Thursday, February 19, 2026 at 5:30 PM. Event is by registration only and must be coordinated directly through Mary in advance. Due to building security, all guests must be checked in at a designated arrival time to gain access upstairs. Available arrival time slots: 5:30 PM, 6:00 PM, 6:30 PM. RSVP on Partiful: https://partiful.com/e/g1hU5HXmUnfJwxpW8u8M?c=fLU6roGc. Hosts: Polina and Mary.

events.title: YSC Happy Hour - The Royal Cuckoo
events.description: YSC Happy Hour at The Royal Cuckoo on Thursday, March 19, 2026, from 5:30 PM. Enjoy exclusive drink specials, live music, and a vintage atmosphere. Hosted by owner Paul (Danish roots).

events.title: YSC Bus Trip to Wine Country - Save the Date
events.description: Save the date: YSC Bus Trip to Wine Country on March 28, 2026. Details coming soon.

events.title: Joint YSC-SSCC Easter Luncheon - Save the Date
events.description: Save the date: Joint YSC-SSCC Easter Luncheon on April 4, 2026. Traditional Scandinavian luncheon; more information to follow. Volunteers can sign up via the provided form (link not included in email).

events.title: Joint YSC-SSCC Kids Easter & Crafts - Save the Date
events.description: Save the date: Joint YSC-SSCC Kids Easter & Crafts on April 5, 2026. Kids- and family-friendly event at the Scandinavian School and Cultural Center. More information to follow.

events.title: Full Moon Hike (YSC)
events.description: Full moon hike held on Friday, January 30, 2026. Mentioned as a recent event with many attendees joining on short notice.
